narrative:
Highland Heights-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 768 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
